problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: If Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
